Author: SaMo (fork: Originaljsx)
Name: PvP Tracker (API 15)
Punchline: PvP match history and stats tracker — Dalamud API 15 fork.
Description: Record, browse and filter your Crystalline Conflict, Frontline and Rival Wings match history, view match scoreboards and view aggregated statistics like win rate and average damage dealt per match. Community fork of wrath16/PvpStats restoring compatibility with Dalamud API 15 (FFXIV patch 7.5).
Changelog:
* Damage encoding decoded — verified against a real CC match log: damage = (effect-03 value) >> 16. Captured 21/22 events now have a real numeric Amount (sum of all damage hits in the line) plus heal_amount (lifesteal) and an absorbed flag (any effect-03 had value=0).
* Captured event types expanded to 37 (NetworkActionSync), 38 (NetworkStatusEffect), 39 (NetworkUpdateHp) for shield/HP analysis.
* Five new exact rollup metrics: damage_dealt_log, damage_taken_log, heal_dealt_log, zero_damage_hits_dealt, zero_damage_hits_taken.
* CSV export includes the new columns.
* Bug fix: type-26 buff Param now correctly read as hex.
